name: Default Merchandising Rules
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Default Merchandising Rule option","bold":true},{"text":" is now designed to offer greater flexibility, transparency, and precision when managing product visibility within Smart Collections. Merchandising rules and pinning now share a menu point and are combined into one area."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The new UI is more aligned with a merchant’s unique business goals—especially in high-conversion environments like promotions, seasonal campaigns, or category-specific push strategies."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With this new interface, merchants can:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Define logic upfront","bold":true},{"text":" that reflects business needs—from pushing high-margin products to promoting seasonal items or balancing stock."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Preview changes in real time","bold":true},{"text":" before deploying them, eliminating the guesswork of how ranking logic will affect live pages.
"}]}]}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"To access "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to: "},{"text":"Smart Collections > Default Merchandising","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/0ce3f7c7-e103-4797-b460-b80d6391a663/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736","embedData":{"url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/0ce3f7c7-e103-4797-b460-b80d6391a663/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=736","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","fileid":"0ce3f7c7-e103-4797-b460-b80d6391a663","filecollection":"contentId-6019579959","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"ssr-server","ssrPlaceholderIgnored":""}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On this page, you will see all the merchandising rules that has been created on the account. Weight"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When creating a Default Merchandising Rule, you can fine-tune how product popularity influences the final product order by adjusting the "},{"text":"Popularity Weight","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Popularity Weight determines how much influence the "},{"text":"product popularity score","bold":true},{"text":" has on the sorting of products within the selected collection. By increasing or decreasing this multiplier, merchants can balance between rule-based promotions and naturally popular products."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This setting is available via the "},{"text":"Advanced Settings","bold":true},{"text":" icon shown beside the "},{"text":"Select Collections","bold":true},{"text":" dropdown."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/dffb522c-1a3f-4ff3-9c42-761fb79b1201/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=760","embedData":{"url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/dffb522c-1a3f-4ff3-9c42-761fb79b1201/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-6019579959&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BBmD4oIJd2YUHbHyNRSYx12jiA0aM6SS6BD-SijereE&width=760","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","fileid":"dffb522c-1a3f-4ff3-9c42-761fb79b1201","filecollection":"contentId-6019579959","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"ssr-server","ssrPlaceholderIgnored":""}},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Popularity Weight Options"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The system offers a slider with the following settings:"}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Weight"}]}]},{"type":"th","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Description"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"0","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Popularity is completely ignored. Only rule-based logic applies."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"0.5x","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Minimal influence of popularity on product ordering."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"1x","bold":true},{"text":" (Default)"}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Standard influence — popularity is weighted equally with other merchandising rules."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"50x","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"High influence — popularity significantly affects ordering, overriding lower-weighted rules."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"100x","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"rowspan":"1","colspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maximum influence — popular products dominate the top positions."}]}]}]}],"id":"table-0-27","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"How to Use It Effectively"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use 0","bold":true},{"text":" when you want complete control over product order through conditions like "},{"text":"Promote","italic":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"Exclude","italic":true},{"text":", or "},{"text":"Include","italic":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use 1x","bold":true},{"text":" when you want a balanced approach — ideal for collections where popularity generally reflects product performance."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use 50x or 100x","bold":true},{"text":" if you want your best-selling or most viewed products to always appear at the top, regardless of other rule logic."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Tip","bold":true},{"text":": If you're testing rule performance, try adjusting the Popularity Weight in combination with the Promote/Exclude rules to observe real-time preview impacts on product
